_comment: SAR detection from planetar-sat (CFAR over Sentinel-1). An anonymous radar blob: NO mmsi/imo/name. It resolves to a planetar:Vessel by spatial-temporal proximity, never by identifier.

identity.note: No identifier. Identity is assigned only by resolution against canonical entities.

fields.name: bbox_px
fields.doc: [row_min,col_min,row_max,col_max] pixel bounds — a complex value, carried via the json repr

fields.name: confidence
fields.doc: snr normalised to 0..1 by the adapter — comparable across sources (see §12 calibration)
